introSection: Jungle Coaster (Simplified Chinese: 丛林过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Chimelong Ocean Kingdom in Xiangzhou, Zhuhai, Guangdong, China.
fullText:
Jungle Coaster (Simplified Chinese: 丛林过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Chimelong Ocean Kingdom in Xiangzhou, Zhuhai, Guangdong, China.



Blue track and tan supports.
